title: Art of governance with Sanjeev Bikhchandani & Kunal Shah | CRED curious
description:
“Remember, upon the conduct of each depends the fate of all.” ― Alexander the Great

Sanjeev Bikhchandani, founder of Naukri.com and an early investor for both Zomato and PolicyBazaar, sits down with Kunal Shah and unpacks hard-earned wisdom from his 3 decades of building, including navigating corporate governance, traits of successful founders and more.

Chapters
1:05 - The beginnings of an entrepreneur
2:45 - Bootstrapping vs funding
8:04 - Investing in startups
14:52 - Gold standards in corpo
